question: Compare pharmacokinetics and pharmacodynamics in one sentence.

answer.content: Pharmacokinetics describes what the body does to the drug over time, while pharmacodynamics describes what the drug does to the body through target engagement, mechanism, dose-response, efficacy, and toxicity.

reasoning_steps.description: Retrieve the relevant concept definition or evidence.

source.original_text: Pharmacokinetics describes what the body does to a drug over time. It covers absorption, distribution, metabolism, and excretion as dynamic processes after dosing. Common pharmacokinetic parameters include half-life, clearance, volume of distribution, bioavailability, maximum concentration, time to maximum concentration, and area under the concentration-time curve.
